# Agent Report Template
## Standard Format for Session Handoff

---

## Session Information

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Agent | [Your identifier] |
| Session ID | [Auto-generated or manual] |
| Date Started | [YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM] |
| Date Completed | [YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM] |
| Duration | [X hours Y minutes] |

---

## Work Summary

### Tasks Completed
1. [Task 1 - brief description]
2. [Task 2 - brief description]

### Tasks Partially Complete
1. [Task - what's done vs what's remaining]

### Tasks Deferred
1. [Task - why deferred and when to resume]

---

## Decisions & Rationale

### Decision 1: [Title]
**Context:** [What was the situation]
**Options Considered:** [What alternatives were evaluated]
**Decision:** [What was chosen]
**Rationale:** [Why this choice]
**Impact:** [What this affects]

### Decision 2: [Title]
[Same format]

---

## Files Modified

| File | Change Type | Summary |
|------|-------------|---------|
| `[path]` | Create/Update/Delete | [Brief description] |
| `[path]` | Create/Update/Delete | [Brief description] |

---

## Issues & Blockers

### Blockers
| Issue | Severity | Status | Next Step |
|-------|----------|--------|-----------|
| [Description] | High/Medium/Low | Active/Resolved | [What needs to happen] |

### Technical Debt
- [Debt item - what and why]
- [Debt item - when to address]

---

## Next Agent Instructions

### Immediate Actions
1. [Specific action to take]
2. [Specific action to take]

### Context for Continuation
[Detailed context the next agent needs to know]

### Recommended Approach
[Suggested way to continue the work]

---

## Testing Status

- [ ] Unit tests written
- [ ] Unit tests passing
- [ ] Integration tests passing
- [ ] Manual testing completed
- [ ] Performance tested (if applicable)

**Test Coverage:** [X%] (target: 80%)

---

## Documentation

- [ ] Code comments added
- [ ] API documentation updated
- [ ] Architecture docs updated
- [ ] Agent-facing docs updated

---

## Sign-off

**Agent:** _______________  
**Date:** _______________  
**Status:** [Complete / Hand-off / Blocked]

**Next Agent (if known):** _______________
